name: classic_robot
description: Bipedal sci-fi robot with cylindrical torso, domed head, arm joints and leg segments
script:
import bpy, math

# --- clean slate for just this object group ---
bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')

def add_cyl(name, r, d, loc, parent=None):
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=r, depth=d, location=loc)
    obj = bpy.context.active_object
    obj.name = name
    if parent:
        obj.parent = parent
    return obj

def add_sph(name, r, loc, parent=None):
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=r, location=loc)
    obj = bpy.context.active_object
    obj.name = name
    if parent:
        obj.parent = parent
    return obj

# Torso
torso = add_cyl('Robot_Torso', 0.35, 0.7, (0,0,1.05))

# Head
head = add_sph('Robot_Head', 0.25, (0,0,1.65), torso)
# Eye sockets
for sx in (-0.12, 0.12):
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=0.06, location=(sx, 0.21, 1.68))
    eye = bpy.context.active_object
    eye.name = f'Robot_Eye_{"L" if sx<0 else "R"}'
    eye.parent = head

# Shoulders
for sx in (-1, 1):
    sh = add_cyl(f'Robot_Shoulder_{"L" if sx<0 else "R"}', 0.1, 0.15,
                 (sx*0.47, 0, 1.25), torso)
    # Upper arm
    ua = add_cyl(f'Robot_UpperArm_{"L" if sx<0 else "R"}', 0.09, 0.35,
                 (sx*0.47, 0, 0.98), sh)
    # Elbow
    el = add_sph(f'Robot_Elbow_{"L" if sx<0 else "R"}', 0.1,
                 (sx*0.47, 0, 0.78), ua)
    # Forearm
    fa = add_cyl(f'Robot_Forearm_{"L" if sx<0 else "R"}', 0.07, 0.3,
                 (sx*0.47, 0, 0.56), el)
    # Hand
    add_sph(f'Robot_Hand_{"L" if sx<0 else "R"}', 0.1,
            (sx*0.47, 0, 0.38), fa)

# Hips
hips = add_cyl('Robot_Hips', 0.28, 0.2, (0,0,0.68), torso)

# Legs
for sx in (-1, 1):
    ht = add_cyl(f'Robot_Thigh_{"L" if sx<0 else "R"}', 0.12, 0.38,
                 (sx*0.18, 0, 0.42), hips)
    kn = add_sph(f'Robot_Knee_{"L" if sx<0 else "R"}', 0.13,
                 (sx*0.18, 0, 0.21), ht)
    sh = add_cyl(f'Robot_Shin_{"L" if sx<0 else "R"}', 0.1, 0.35,
                 (sx*0.18, 0, 0.02), kn)
    # Foot
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(
        size=1, location=(sx*0.18, 0.06, -0.19))
    ft = bpy.context.active_object
    ft.scale = (0.14, 0.22, 0.07)
    ft.name = f'Robot_Foot_{"L" if sx<0 else "R"}'
    ft.parent = sh
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(scale=True)

# Material — gunmetal grey
mat = bpy.data.materials.new('RobotMetal')
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF']
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.25, 0.27, 0.30, 1)
bsdf.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.95
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.35
for obj in bpy.data.objects:
    if obj.name.startswith('Robot_'):
        if obj.data and hasattr(obj.data, 'materials'):
            obj.data.materials.clear()
            obj.data.materials.append(mat)

# Eye material — glowing amber
eye_mat = bpy.data.materials.new('RobotEye')
eye_mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf_e = eye_mat.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF']
bsdf_e.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (1.0, 0.5, 0.0, 1)
bsdf_e.inputs['Emission Color'].default_value = (1.0, 0.5, 0.0, 1)
bsdf_e.inputs['Emission Strength'].default_value = 3.0
for obj in bpy.data.objects:
    if 'Eye' in obj.name:
        obj.data.materials.clear()
        obj.data.materials.append(eye_mat)

torso.name = 'ClassicRobot'
print('SCRIPT_DONE: ClassicRobot created')

name: industrial_robot_arm
description: 6-axis industrial robot arm on a base platform with joints
script:
import bpy

bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')

def box(name, sx, sy, sz, loc, parent=None):
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=loc)
    o = bpy.context.active_object
    o.name = name
    o.scale = (sx, sy, sz)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(scale=True)
    if parent: o.parent = parent
    return o

def cyl(name, r, d, loc, rot=(0,0,0), parent=None):
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=r, depth=d,
        location=loc, rotation=rot)
    o = bpy.context.active_object
    o.name = name
    if parent: o.parent = parent
    return o

import math
HPI = math.pi/2

base   = box('RA_Base',   0.6, 0.6, 0.15, (0,0,0.075))
turn   = cyl('RA_Turntable', 0.25, 0.12, (0,0,0.21))
link1  = box('RA_Link1',  0.18, 0.18, 0.55, (0,0,0.55),  turn)
j1     = cyl('RA_Joint1', 0.14, 0.18, (0,0,0.86), (HPI,0,0), link1)
link2  = box('RA_Link2',  0.14, 0.14, 0.45, (0,0.27,0.86), j1)
j2     = cyl('RA_Joint2', 0.11, 0.16, (0,0.27,1.12), (HPI,0,0), link2)
link3  = box('RA_Link3',  0.11, 0.11, 0.35, (0,0.52,1.12), j2)
j3     = cyl('RA_Joint3', 0.09, 0.14, (0,0.52,1.33), (HPI,0,0), link3)
wrist  = cyl('RA_Wrist',  0.08, 0.18, (0,0.52,1.47), (0,0,0),   j3)
tool   = box('RA_Tool',   0.12, 0.12, 0.06, (0,0.52,1.59), wrist)
# Gripper fingers
for i,sx in enumerate((-0.07, 0.07)):
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(sx, 0.52, 1.68))
    f = bpy.context.active_object
    f.name = f'RA_Finger_{i}'
    f.scale = (0.025, 0.025, 0.1)
    f.parent = tool
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(scale=True)

# Yellow industrial paint
mat = bpy.data.materials.new('IndustrialYellow')
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF']
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.95, 0.75, 0.05, 1)
bsdf.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.7
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.4
for o in bpy.data.objects:
    if o.name.startswith('RA_') and o.data and hasattr(o.data, 'materials'):
        o.data.materials.clear()
        o.data.materials.append(mat)

base.name = 'IndustrialRobotArm'
print('SCRIPT_DONE: IndustrialRobotArm created')
